stemHtml: The time difference in Local Mean Time between sunset at positions A 50°N, 120°E and B 50°S, 120°E on the 21st of November is…

options.a: some hours and the Sun rises earlier in B than in A.
options.b: negligible small because A and B are located symmetrically to the Equator.
options.c: negligible small because A and B are located at the same meridian.
options.d: some hours and the Sun rises earlier in A than in B.
